citation_short: Asia Watch / HRW report on Punjab, 1991
title: Punjab in Crisis
geographic_scope: Golden Temple complex and wider Punjab conflict
strengths: Best recovered single source for the official White Paper death figures and the inside-complex population composition.
limitations: Uses secondary reporting for the inside-population breakdown and stresses that the official death counts are disputed.

title: Operation Bluestar - 05 June 1984 - Indian Army
pages_or_sections: article body; order of battle and casualty paragraph
strengths: Useful corroboration for the official casualty figures and for naming assault units.
limitations: Secondary retrospective source, not a primary official order-of-battle roster.
notes: Used mainly to show that unit identities are public while committed headcounts remain unrecovered.

citation_short: Rajya Sabha debate on Punjab White Paper, 25 July 1984
title: Motion re. White Paper on Punjab Agitation
author_or_org: Rajya Sabha (Upper House of Parliament, India)
geographic_scope: Operation Blue Star / Golden Temple debate
strengths: Contemporary public critique that helps bracket armed-defender magnitude and highlights uncertainty about the size of the Army deployment.
limitations: Political debate, not a source-direct troop roster.
notes: Used as context only, not as the main denominator source.
